zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I D'Ollehain於1208年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧利海時，他的父親Hugues D'Ollehain29歲，母親Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal18歲。他於1228年與Ade De Rollancourt結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I D'Ollehain于1208年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯奧利海时，他的父亲Hugues D'Ollehain29岁，母亲Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal18岁。他于1228年与Ade De Rollancourt结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷斯尼可吉萊-多爾芒享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I D'Ollehain was born in 1208, in Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hugues D'Ollehain, was 29 and his mother, Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, was 18. He married Ade De Rollancourt in 1228. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1258, in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I D'Ollehain est né en 1208, à Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hugues D'Ollehain, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ade De Rollancourt en 1228. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1258, à Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I D'Ollehain 1208 in Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues D'Ollehain 29 und seine Mutter Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal 18. Er hat 1228 Ade De Rollancourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I D'Ollehain è nato il nel 1208 nel Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues D'Ollehain, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ade De Rollancourt nel 1228. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1258, nel Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean I D'Ollehainが1208年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスオルヘインで生まれた時，父Hugues D'Ollehainは29歳，母Sibylle De Gauchin le Galは18歳であった。1228年にAde De Rollancourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレスニコウルト-レ-ドルメンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I D'Ollehain(이)가 1208년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 하인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues D'Ollehain(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1228년 Ade De Rollancourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레스니쿠르트-레-도멘에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I D'Ollehain nasceu em 1208, em Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hugues D'Ollehain, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ade De Rollancourt em 1228. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1258, em Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I D'Ollehain родился в 1208 г. в местности олхан, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues D'Ollehain было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ade De Rollancourt в 1228 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1258 г. в местности фресникоурт-ле-долмен, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I D'Ollehain nació en 1208, en Olhain, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hugues D'Ollehain, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sibylle De Gauchin le Gal, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ade De Rollancourt en 1228. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1258, en Fresnicourt-le-Dolmen, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
